description_long: This is a medium-sized cardboard shipping box with various printed handling and shipping symbols on its surfaces. The box features standard international icons such as 'fragile', 'keep dry', 'this side up', and recycling symbols, as well as a large alphanumeric code and date stamps. The top of the box displays a bold, circular symbol with a crossed-out motif, likely indicating a handling restriction. The cardboard is a natural brown color, with black ink used for all markings and labels. The box appears to be sealed and is constructed from corrugated cardboard, typical for parcels used in urban logistics and delivery. Its surfaces are matte and slightly textured, consistent with standard packaging materials.
description: A brown cardboard shipping box with black printed handling symbols, codes, and recycling marks. The box is sealed and features a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with 'fragile', 'keep dry', and 'this side up' symbols, as well as a large black square and a portion of the top's circular symbol.
description_view_1: This view highlights the alphanumeric code '6062B0013201', recycling symbols, and date stamps, with the top's circular symbol also visible.
description_view_2: This view displays more handling symbols, including 'fragile', 'keep dry', 'this side up', and a crossed-out box, along with a large black square.
description_view_3: This view shows the side with the alphanumeric code and date stamps, partially wrapping around the box, and the top's circular symbol.
